items.label: Memento Photo
items.description: A pocket proof that reminds the target they were seen before the registry touched them.

items.label: Field Recording
items.description: A scraped room tone from the source world. Helps Bosch line up the next hit.

items.label: Joker Card
items.description: A bad credential that still passes one hostile check.

equipment.label: Wet Fit
equipment.description: Worn classification that makes stale labels slide off.

equipment.label: Duck Camo
equipment.description: Pattern logic for crossing an observer's blind spot.

swagMoves.label: Wake Up / rumor
swagMoves.description: Peels one bad overlay off an ally and restores HP.
swagMoves.message: Bosch calls a rumor back into the room.

swagMoves.label: Ghost Sprite / witness
swagMoves.description: Summons witness-static around the target and makes their label flicker.
swagMoves.message: Ghost sprites testify in the static.

swagMoves.label: Wrong Background / record
swagMoves.description: Forces the enemy record to render on the wrong layer.
swagMoves.message: The background refuses the enemy's paperwork.

swagMoves.label: Work Fit / source
swagMoves.description: Turns worn classification into a direct action buff.
swagMoves.message: The fit becomes proof of work.
